name: Answer of the Gate
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Faded Legacy - Ch. 9 - A Long Dream's End
descriptionTemplate: {Discover} 1 out of 3 random Posses and gain [Arg1] Keyflare.
lore:
The Truth of all things lies beyond the Gate.
She remains silent here, bearing all the inquiries, responding with silence.
The one she awaits will eventually write their own answer.
